headline: Equinix (EQIX) Valuation Check After Strong Q1 Results And New Kuala Lumpur Data Centre Project
summary: Equinix (EQIX) is back in focus after a cluster of supportive news, including strong fiscal Q1 results, higher growth estimates, enthusiastic analyst commentary, and fresh investment and product announcements across its global data centre network. See our latest analysis for Equinix. Recent news around Q1 results, fresh product launches such as Fabric Geo Zones, and the planned US$190m Kuala Lumpur data centre has come alongside a 90 day share price return of 12.47% and a 5 year total...

headline: Equinix Puts Enterprises in Control of Data Sovereignty Across Hybrid Multicloud Environments
summary: Equinix, Inc. (Nasdaq: EQIX), the world's digital infrastructure company®, today announced the global expansion of Equinix Fabric Geo Zones, the first network-level, sovereignty enforcement layer that operates across interconnected clouds and providers. Enterprises face growing compliance risks from network rerouting events that can inadvertently move sovereign data across borders they are legally required to respect. Built natively into Equinix Fabric®, Geo Zones eliminates that risk by keeping

headline: Poland Data Center Market Investment Analysis Report 2026-2031 Featuring Atman, Beyond.pl, Data4, Equinix, Netia, Orange Business, Polcom, T-Mobile, Vantage Data Centers, and 3S Group
summary: The Poland data center market is set for robust growth, projecting a CAGR of 16.19% from 2024 to 2031. As a major colocation hub in Central and Eastern Europe, Poland hosts 61 colocation facilities, with Warsaw leading. Retail colocation dominated 2025's market, exceeding wholesale revenues, yet wholesale investments are expected to lead by 2031. Key players like Atman, Equinix, and T-Mobile drive this segment, while new entrants highlight rising demand. This market analysis provides insights in

headline: Netherlands Data Center Market Investment Analysis Report 2026: 129 Data Centers with Over 17 New Facilities Underway, Led by Giants Like NTT DATA, Equinix, Digital Realty - Growth Forecast to 2030
summary: The Netherlands data center market is poised for significant growth, with a projected CAGR of 13.15% from 2025 to 2031. Serving as a low-latency gateway to Europe, supported by robust fiber connectivity and pro-technology policies, around 90% of DDA member centers utilize renewable energy, emphasizing sustainability. headline: Southeast Asia Data Center Construction Industry Outlook Report 2026: Investments are Expected to Grow at a CAGR of 17.83% During 2025-2031, Driven by Attraction from Major Operators
summary: The Southeast Asia data center construction market is projected to expand significantly, with an estimated CAGR of 17.83% between 2025 and 2031. Key trends include a shift towards sustainability, with renewable energy sources like green hydrogen and solar power gaining traction. Liquid cooling and advanced data center technologies are being adopted to support high-density computing and AI workloads.
